case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNI vs. RANGER INSURANCE et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,104.00
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT DISCHARGE THE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNI AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2001, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO APPEARANCE-TENTATIVE ADOPTED-GRANTED.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM DEC-12-2000 TO JAN-17-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
